description: Project template and state management following UDO v2.0 framework

key_features.session_logging: Complete session tracking and handoff protocol
key_features.decision_logging: Rationale capture for all significant decisions
key_features.checkpoint_system: State snapshots for recovery and versioning
key_features.protocol_compliance: Strict adherence to framework hard stops

framework_inheritance.relationship: Project extends and uses framework but does not modify it
framework_inheritance.rule_hierarchy: Framework rules override project rules when conflict exists

note: This project folder is mutable and project-specific. The UDO Framework folder is immutable and shared.
